description: AnimeCard enhancements: filler badge, canon episode count, improved AIRING badge, footer year update, and meta keywords fix
steps: Update src/components/AnimeCard.tsx to accept new optional props: fillerCount (number | null), fillerPercent (number | null). Show episode count as '220 EP (95 filler)' when fillerCount is provided and > 0, otherwise just '64 EP'. For anime without filler data, show just 'N EP'.

Add a filler badge overlay on the card image (bottom-left area, near the year) when fillerPercent is provided and > 0. Use a small colored indicator like 'XX% filler' with brand-orange/red coloring for high filler (>30%), yellow for moderate (15-30%), and green for low (<15%).

Update the AIRING badge in AnimeCard.tsx: replace the current simple text badge with a pulsing green dot (using animate-pulse) + 'AIRING' text. Use bg-emerald-500/20 backdrop with text-emerald-400 and a small dot that pulses.
Update src/components/Footer.tsx: change the years array from [2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020] to [2026, 2025, 2024, 2023, 2022, 2021, 2020].

Update src/lib/content-generator.ts generateMetaTitle and generateMetaDescription functions: ensure they generate unique per-page keywords. Add a new exported function generateMetaKeywords(type: string, anime?: AnimeData, extra?: string): string[] that returns relevant keywords based on page type. For 'filler' type: include anime title + 'filler list', 'filler guide', 'episodes to skip', genre keywords. For 'genre' type: include genre name + 'best', 'top', 'anime', year. For 'anime' type: include title variants, genres, status.

Update all pages that use AnimeCard to pass filler data when available. Key pages to update: src/app/page.tsx (already has filler data for fillerAnime section), src/app/top/[type]/page.tsx (add fillerMapping include to queries), src/app/genre/[genre]/page.tsx (add fillerMapping include to query). The include should be: fillerMapping: { select: { totalFiller: true, fillerPercent: true } }.

In src/app/top/[type]/page.tsx, update all prisma.anime.findMany calls to include fillerMapping select, then pass fillerCount={anime.fillerMapping?.totalFiller} fillerPercent={anime.fillerMapping?.fillerPercent} to AnimeCard.
In src/app/genre/[genre]/page.tsx, update the prisma.anime.findMany call to include fillerMapping select, then pass filler props to AnimeCard.
acceptance_criteria: AnimeCard shows 'N EP (X filler)' format when filler data is available
AnimeCard shows a colored filler percentage badge when fillerPercent > 0
AIRING badge has a pulsing green dot animation
Build passes: npx prisma generate && npx next build
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/anime-guide-engine && npx prisma generate && npx next build
